productDisplayName: Timberland Women's Estela Umbrella Green Flip Flop
description: These women's Earthkeepers® Estela Cork Umbrella Thong sandals from timberland are understated and comfortable and look perfect for everyday casual wear. Upper Slip-on thong style for easy removal and insertion of the feet Straps made of premium leather and Bionic canvas for durability (Bionic® canvas contains yarns made with a 50% organic cotton outer wrap, 38% recycled PET core and 12% HT polyester for increased strength, abrasion resistance and decreased dry time) Midsole Leather covered, foam cushioned footbed offers optimal comfort Cork wrapped midsole for a lightweight feel Outsole Lightweight, flexible, non-marking rubber lug outsole for maximum traction and durability is made with 15% recycled rubber (Lightweight rubber lug outsoles are made with 15% recycled rubber) Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
